forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Mostly Cloudy
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before midnight. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 39. North northwest wind 5 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

forecast.name: Thursday
forecast.shortForecast: Partly Sunny then Slight Chance Rain Showers
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers between 3pm and 5pm. Partly sunny. High near 54, with temperatures falling to around 52 in the afternoon. Northwest wind 6 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Thursday Night
forecast.shortForecast: Partly Cloudy then Areas Of Frost
forecast.detailedForecast: Areas of frost after 2am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 35. North northwest wind 2 to 8 mph. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
